papers.title: LLaSO: A Reproducible Foundation for Large Speech-Language Models
papers.abstract:
The development of Large Speech-Language Models (LSLMs) has been limited by fragmented architectures and poor transparency, making reproducibility and fair comparison difficult. In contrast to the vision–language domain, where open resources have driven rapid progress, LSLMs are often released only as model weights without their training data or configurations, leaving the field without common baselines.
We present LLaSO, the first fully open, end-to-end framework for large-scale speech–language modeling. LLaSO consists of three key components: (1) LLaSO-Align, a 12M-instance speech–text alignment corpus; (2) LLaSO-Instruct, a 13.5M-instance multi-task instruction-tuning dataset for speech–text understanding; and (3) LLaSO-Eval, a standardized, reproducible benchmark for cross-modal evaluation.
To demonstrate its utility, we train LLaSO-Base, a 3.8B-parameter reference model built entirely on public data. LLaSO-Base achieves a normalized score of 0.72, outperforming comparable models and providing a strong, reproducible baseline. Our analysis further shows that while broader training coverage improves performance, significant generalization gaps remain, especially in speech-only scenarios.
By releasing datasets, benchmarks, and models together, LLaSO establishes an open standard for LSLMs, enabling unified research and faster community progress.

papers.title: EchoX: Towards Mitigating Acoustic-Semantic Gap via Echo Training for Speech-to-Speech LLMs
papers.abstract: Speech-to-speech large language models (SLLMs) are attracting increasing attention. Derived from text-based large language models (LLMs), SLLMs often exhibit degradation in knowledge and reasoning capabilities. We hypothesize that this limitation arises because current training paradigms for SLLMs fail to bridge the acoustic-semantic gap in the feature representation space. To address this issue, we propose EchoX, which leverages semantic representations and dynamically generates speech training targets. This approach integrates both acoustic and semantic learning, enabling EchoX to preserve strong reasoning abilities as a speech LLM. Experimental results demonstrate that EchoX, with about six thousand hours of training data, achieves advanced performance on multiple knowledge-based question-answering benchmarks.

papers.title: MoST: Mixing Speech and Text with Modality-Aware Mixture of Experts
papers.abstract: We present MoST (Mixture of Speech and Text), a novel multimodal large language  model that seamlessly integrates speech and text processing through our proposed Modality-Aware Mixture of Experts (MAMoE) architecture. While current multimodal models typically process diverse modality representations with identical parameters—disregarding their inherent representational differences, we introduce specialized routing pathways that direct tokens to modality-appropriate experts based on input type. MAMoE simultaneously enhances modality-specific learning and cross-modal understanding through two complementary components: modality-specific expert groups that capture domain-specific patterns and shared experts that facilitate information transfer between modalities. Building on this architecture, we develop an efficient transformation pipeline that adapts the pretrained MoE language model through strategic post-training on ASR and TTS datasets, followed by fine-tuning with a carefully curated speech-text instruction dataset. A key feature of this pipeline is that it relies exclusively on fully accessible, open-source datasets to achieve strong performance and data efficiency. Comprehensive evaluations across ASR, TTS, audio language modeling, and spoken question answering benchmarks show that MoST consistently outperforms existing models of comparable parameter counts. Our ablation studies confirm that the modality-specific routing mechanism and shared experts design significantly contribute to performance gains across all tested domains. To our knowledge, MoST represents the first fully open-source speech-text LLM built on a Mixture of Experts architecture.

papers.title: FastALM: Hierarchical Frame Q-Former for Effective Audio Modality Adaptation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated human-expert-level capabilities, driving significant interest in their potential for achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI). In particular, there is growing momentum in adapting LLMs to various modalities—including vision, video, and speech—through the development of multimodal LLMs (MLLMs). However, existing speech-language models (SLMs) research has largely overlooked cost-effective adaptation strategies for leveraging LLMs in the speech domain. In this paper, we propose FastSLM, a lightweight yet efficient SLM designed for effective understanding and reasoning over long-form speech. To address the challenge of aligning high-frame speech features with LLM, we introduce the hierarchical frame querying transformer (HFQ-Former), which compresses frame-level speech features while capturing both local and global context. Furthermore, we present a novel three-stage training strategy that enhances generalization across a wide range of speech-related tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that FastSLM achieves competitive performance compared to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) models, despite operating with significantly lower FLOPs and parameter counts, while representing speech with only 1.67 tokens per second. The source code and model checkpoints are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/FastALM-1D6B.

papers.title: Scaling Speech Tokenizers with Diffusion Autoencoders
papers.abstract: Speech tokenizers are foundational to speech language models, yet existing approaches face two major challenges: (1) balancing trade-offs between encoding semantics for understanding and acoustics for reconstruction, and (2) achieving low bit rates and low token rates. We propose Speech Diffusion Tokenizer (SiTok), a diffusion autoencoder that jointly learns semantic-rich representations through supervised learning and enables high-fidelity audio reconstruction with diffusion. We scale SiTok to 1.6B parameters and train it on 2 million hours of speech. Experiments show that SiTok outperforms strong baselines on understanding, reconstruction and generation tasks, at an extremely low token rate of 12.5 Hz and a bit-rate of 200 bits-per-second.

papers.title: Semi-Supervised Speech Enhancement with Gradient-Guided Channel Attenuation
papers.abstract: Recent methods for speech enhancement (SE) have generally adopted the supervised learning way and trained the models on synthetic noisy-clean paired speech data. However, when applying the supervised trained SE model to the recordings of real-world scenario, which we call unlabeled data, it will lead to the performance degradation. To improve the generalization performance of SE, we propose a semi-supervised monaural speech enhancement network, SS-SENet, which adopts the mean-teacher (MT) framework with domain adversarial (DA) learning to effectively exploit the unlabeled data. We also propose the Gradient-Guided Channel Attenuation (GGCA) module for suppressing the domain-specific features and enhance domain-invariant one, and Domain Shift-Aware Monitor (DSAM) strategy for dynamically adjusting the attenuation rate in GGCA. Comparing with seven SOTA methods exploiting the unlabeled data, our proposed SS-SENet achieves the best performances at all metrics both on synthetic Reverberant LibriCHiME-5 and LibriMix datasets, and at the critical metric, OVRL, on the real-world CHiME-5 dataset. The results verify that our proposed basic MT-based method is superior to the compared methods based on full supervised or self-supervised learning. It also verifies the effectiveness of our proposed GGCA module and DSAM strategy. The source code is available at \url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SS-SENet}.

papers.title: Latent Speech-Text Transformer
papers.abstract: Auto-regressive speech–text models pre-trained on interleaved text tokens and discretized speech tokens demonstrate strong speech understanding and generation, yet remain substantially less compute-efficient than text LLMs, partly due to the much longer sequences of speech tokens relative to text. This modality imbalance disproportionately allocates pre-training and inference compute to speech, potentially hindering effective cross-modal alignment and slowing performance scaling by orders of magnitude. We introduce the Latent Speech-Text Transformer (LST), which aggregates speech tokens into latent speech patches that serve as higher-level autoregressive units. This design aligns the sequence-modeling granularity between speech and text while improving computational efficiency. The resulting patches can align with textual units to facilitate cross-modal knowledge transfer and compactly capture recurring acoustic patterns such as silence. Across story-completion benchmarks under both compute-controlled and data-controlled settings, LST consistently improves speech accuracy while also improving text performance, achieving up to +6.5% absolute gain on speech HellaSwag in compute-controlled training (+5.3% in data-controlled training). Under compute-controlled scaling from 420M to 1.8B parameters in a near compute-optimal regime, gains grow with scale, and improvements persist up to 7B parameters under fixed-token budgets. These benefits extend to downstream tasks: LST stabilizes ASR adaptation and reduces the effective autoregressive sequence length during ASR and TTS inference, lowering computational cost without degrading reconstruction quality. The Code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/lst.

papers.title: Sylber 2.0: A Universal Syllable Embedding
papers.abstract: Scaling spoken language modeling requires speech tokens that are both efficient and universal. Recent work has proposed syllables as promising speech tokens at low temporal resolution, but existing models are constrained to English and fail to capture sufficient acoustic detail. To address this, we present Sylber 2.0, a universal framework for coding speech at the syllable level, enabling efficient temporal compression and high-fidelity reconstruction across multiple languages and expressive styles. Building on the original Sylber, Sylber 2.0 improves both linguistic coverage and reconstruction quality by training on diverse multilingual speech and introducing a syllable-level acoustic encoder and vocoder. Sylber 2.0 achieves a very low token frequency around 5 Hz, while retaining both linguistic and acoustic detail. Experiments show that it performs on par with previous models operating on high-frequency baselines, and it outperforms the original Sylber by a significant margin. We further demonstrate the efficacy of Sylber 2.0 in downstream tasks, especially in English TTS and low-resource ASR. Sylber 2.0 based TTS model, SylFlow, can generate speech with competitive intelligibility and quality with current SOTA models using only 72M, and be more effective in resource-constrained ASR than previous speech coding frameworks. In sum, we establish an effective syllable-level abstraction for general spoken language.

papers.title: SpeechQC-Agent: A Natural Language Driven Multi-Agent System for Speech Dataset Quality
papers.abstract: Ensuring the quality of large-scale datasets is a prerequisite for reliable machine learning, yet current verification pipelines are static, domain-specific, and heavily reliant on human experts. We introduce **SpeechQC-Agent**, the first natural language-driven agentic framework for dataset quality control that generalizes across modalities, vendors, and languages. A central planner LLM decomposes user queries into directed acyclic graph (DAG) workflows executed by modular sub-agents that combine reusable tools with LLM-synthesized functions, enabling flexible and scalable verification. Unlike rule-based scripts, this design supports parallelism, dependency management, and adaptive extension to novel schemas. To benchmark verification systems, we release **SpeechQC-Dataset**, a multilingual speech corpus with controlled perturbations spanning audio, transcripts, and metadata, allowing systematic evaluation of 24 verification tasks. Experiments show that SpeechQC-Agent achieves 80-90\% of expert level accuracy while operating at less than 20\% of cost and time and generalizes from synthetic perturbations to real vendor-supplied corpora. Comparative analysis across multiple planner LLMs highlights trade-offs between fidelity (GPT-4.1-mini), efficiency (LLaMA-3.3-70B), and reasoning strength (DeepSeek-R1). Beyond speech, our approach establishes a general paradigm for LLM-driven workflow generation in dataset quality assurance, with implications for the curation of multimodal and multilingual resources on scale.

papers.title: UNISE: Unified Noise-Invariant Learning for Speech Enhancement toward Improved Content Preservation
papers.abstract:
The importance of semantic information in speech enhancement (SE) has recently been emphasized to improve intelligibility, whereas earlier work primarily focused solely on acoustic perceptual quality. To address this, recent approaches leverage pre-trained self-supervised representations, which have shown strong performance on {discriminative} tasks. However, such representations are less effective for {generative} tasks and, since they are typically trained only on clean data, struggle to fully preserve content under noisy or distorted conditions. 
In this work, we aim to bridge this gap by introducing a unified generative SE model, called \textbf{UNISE}, that incorporates noise-invariant representation learning. By jointly learning an encoder using noise-invariant clustering and a generative decoder, our model produces robust speech representations well suited for the SE task.
As a result, UNISE achieves improved linguistic content preservation while maintaining competitive perceptual quality\footnote{Audio samples are available at: \url{https://tinyurl.com/UNISE-ICLR2026}}.

papers.title: Speech Codecs Beyond Compression: Towards Autoregressive Generative Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent advances in speech language models have leveraged discrete speech representations from pretrained codecs to enable scalable training and generation. However, existing codecs are primarily designed for compression, without accounting for the autoregressive nature of language model training. This mismatch leads to suboptimal performance when using compressed speech tokens for sequence modeling. In this work, we revisit speech discretization from the perspective of generative modeling and propose a novel framework to align tokenization with the autoregressive training paradigm. Specifically, we introduce autoregressive-compatible constraints into the codec training process, encouraging token sequences that better reflect the temporal consistency and predictability expected by language models. In addition, we propose using heterogeneous sampling strategy for different layers of audio tokens (semantic versus acoustic) to enhance the alignment between semantic tokens and the speech's textual content. Experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our approach bridges the gap between audio compression and generative modeling, enabling more effective continued pretraining of existing large language models on audio data. Consistent performance gains across multiple codecs further validate the generalizability of our proposed method.

papers.title: SPEAR: A Unified SSL Framework for Learning Speech and Audio Representations
papers.abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) excels at learning generic representations of acoustic signals, yet prevailing methods remain domain-specific, tailored to either speech or general audio, hindering the development of a unified representation model with a comprehensive capability over both domains. To address this, we present SPEAR (SPEech and Audio Representations), the first SSL framework to successfully learn unified speech and audio representations from a mixture of speech and audio data. SPEAR proposes a unified pre-training objective based on masked prediction of fine-grained discrete tokens for both speech and general audio. These tokens are derived from continuous speech and audio representations using a Multi-codebook Vector Quantisation (MVQ) method, retaining rich acoustic detail essential for modelling both speech and complex audio events. SPEAR is applied to pre-train both single-domain and unified speech-and-audio SSL models. Our speech-domain model establishes a new state-of-the-art on the SUPERB benchmark, a speech processing benchmark for SSL models, matching or surpassing the highly competitive WavLM Large on 12 out of 15 tasks with the same pre-training corpora and a similar model size. Crucially, our unified model learns complementary features and demonstrates comprehensive capabilities across two major benchmarks, SUPERB and HEAR, for evaluating audio representations. By further scaling up the model size and pre-training data, we present a unified model with 600M parameters that excels in both domains, establishing it as one of the most powerful and versatile open-source SSL models for auditory understanding. The inference code and pre-trained models will be made publicly available.

papers.title: Alignment Does Matter: Enables Pure-Speech-Token Dialogue with Frozen Text LLMs
papers.abstract:
End-to-end speech dialogue models typically inherit knowledge from pretrained text LLMs by continually learning to model speech tokens. Thus, alignment between speech tokens and text tokens becomes critical: effective alignment enables more efficient transfer of LLM knowledge from text to speech. A well-known challenge lies in the sequence length mismatch between speech tokens and text tokens. But is matching them on average (i.e., making one second of speech map to the same number of tokens as the corresponding text) truly optimal? The answer remains unknown.
In this paper, we aim to discover the optimal speech sequence length—equivalently, the frame rate of speech tokens—for inheriting text LLM knowledge. First, we observe that when forcing speech length to approach text length under a standard LLM architecture (single VQ + single LM head), information loss becomes a bottleneck. To address this, we propose a new method that enables scaling the VQ codebook capacity up to nearly 300 bits per frame, coupled with an efficient audio LM head. This design preserves sufficient speech information under aggressive downsampling while aligning sequence lengths more closely with text tokens, all without modifying the base text LLM backbone. Next, we explore three alignment tasks—speech→text, text→speech, and speech→speech—under different speech token frame rates, while keeping the text LLM parameters frozen. Furthermore, we find that speech and text representation still occupy distinct latent subspaces in the LLM. To mitigate this gap, we introduce a representation alignment objective to further strengthen cross-modal alignment.
Experiments show that with only alignment, a frozen text LLM can already perform pure speech-to-speech QA, achieving comparable results on speech QA benchmarks.

papers.title: Efficient Audio-Visual Speech Separation with Discrete Lip Semantics and Multi-Scale Global-Local Attention
papers.abstract: Audio-visual speech separation (AVSS) methods leverage visual cues to extract target speech and have demonstrated strong separation quality in noisy acoustic environments. However, these methods usually involve a large number of parameters and require high computational cost, which is unacceptable in many applications where speech separation serves as only a preprocessing step for further speech processing. To address this issue, we propose an efficient AVSS method, named **Dolphin**. For visual feature extraction, we develop **DP‑LipCoder**, a dual‑path lightweight video encoder that transforms lip‑motion into discrete audio‑aligned semantic tokens. For audio separation, we construct a lightweight encoder–decoder separator, in which each layer incorporates a global–local attention (GLA) block to efficiently capture multi-scale dependencies. Experiments on three benchmark datasets showed that Dolphin not only surpassed the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) model in separation quality but also achieved remarkable improvements in efficiency: over 50\% fewer parameters, more than 2.4$\times$ reduction in MACs, and over 6$\times$ faster GPU inference speed. These results indicate that Dolphin offers a practical and deployable solution for high-performance AVSS in real-world scenarios. Our code and demo page are publicly available at https://cslikai.cn/Dolphin.

papers.title: Gogo: Group-wise granularity-ordered codec for stable and efficient speech generation
papers.abstract: Current speech language models require their core component, the speech codec, to discretize continuous speech signals into tokens that not only capture high-level cues for autoregressive modeling but also preserve sufficient acoustic details for perceptual quality. To address this need, we propose Gogo, a group-wise granularity-ordered codec that quantizes each group of frames into tokens arranged from coarse to fine, where coarse tokens encode high-level abstractions and fine tokens progressively recover low-level details. Building on the granularity-ordering property of Gogo, we introduce GogoSpeech, a two-stage speech language model that performs speech generation by first constructing a coarse speech backbone at an extremely low token rate and then enriching the backbone with fine-grained acoustic details. Considering the inherently non-uniform information distribution in speech signals, we further design a Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)-trained token allocator that adaptively allocates token budgets to groups based on group-wise complexity. Experimental results demonstrate that Gogo delivers state-of-the-art reconstruction performance across most metrics at a token rate of 47. Moreover, evaluations on zero-shot text-to-speech tasks show that GogoSpeech enables efficient generation by adaptively reducing the average token rate, and attains state-of-the-art results in long-form speech generation.

papers.title: SpeechOp: Inference-Time Task Composition for Generative Speech Processing
papers.abstract: While generative Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems leverage vast "in-the-wild" data to achieve remarkable success, speech-to-speech processing tasks like enhancement face data limitations, which lead data-hungry generative approaches to distort speech content and speaker identity. To bridge this gap, we present SpeechOp, a multi-task latent diffusion model that transforms pre-trained TTS models into a universal speech processor capable of performing a wide range of speech tasks and composing them in novel ways at inference time. By adapting a pre-trained TTS model, SpeechOp inherits a rich understanding of natural speech, accelerating training and improving S2S task quality, while simultaneously enhancing core TTS performance. Finally, we introduce Implicit Task Composition (ITC), a novel pipeline where ASR-derived transcripts (e.g., from Whisper) guide SpeechOp's enhancement via our principled inference-time task composition. ITC achieves state-of-the-art content preservation by robustly combining web-scale speech understanding with SpeechOp's generative capabilities.

papers.title: Fast Text-to-Audio Generation with One-Step Sampling via Energy-Scoring and Auxiliary Contextual Representation Distillation
papers.abstract: Autoregressive (AR) models with diffusion heads have recently achieved strong text-to-audio performance, yet their iterative decoding and multi-step sampling process introduce high-latency issues. To address this bottleneck, we propose a one-step sampling framework that combines an energy-distance training objective with representation-level distillation. An energy-scoring head maps Gaussian noise directly to audio latents in one step, eliminating the need for a costly recursive diffusion sampling process, while distillation from a masked autoregressive (MAR) text-to-audio model preserves the strong conditioning learned during diffusion training. On the AudioCaps benchmark, our method consistently outperforms prior one-step baselines on both objective and subjective metrics while substantially narrowing the quality gap to AR diffusion systems with multi-step sampling. Compared to the state-of-the-art AR diffusion system, IMPACT, our approach achieves up to $25$× faster inference with highly competitive audio quality. These results demonstrate that combining energy-distance training with representation-level distillation provides an effective recipe for fast, high-quality text-to-audio synthesis.

papers.title: Measuring Audio's Impact on Correctness: Audio-Contribution-Aware Post-Training of Large Audio Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) represent an important frontier in multimodal AI, addressing diverse audio tasks. Recently, post-training of LALMs has received increasing attention due to significant performance improvements over foundation models. While single-stage post-training such as reinforcement learning (RL) has demonstrated promising results, multi-stage approaches such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by RL remain suboptimal. The allocation of data across multiple training stages to maximize LALM capabilities has not been fully explored, and large-scale, high-quality datasets for such research are also lacking. To address these problems, we firstly present AudioMCQ, a comprehensive audio multiple-choice question dataset comprising 571k samples with two kinds of chain-of-thought annotations. Secondly, we investigate the prevalent zero audio-contribution phenomenon in LALMs, where models derive correct answers solely from textual information without processing audio content. We propose Audio-Contribution Filtering to partition data into weak and strong audio-contribution subsets. Based on these insights, we develop two effective post-training paradigms: Weak-to-Strong (SFT on weak audio-contribution data followed by RL on strong audio-contribution data) and Mixed-to-Strong (SFT on mixed audio-contribution data followed by RL on strong audio-contribution data). We achieve first place in the DCASE 2025 Audio-Question-Answering challenge by using AudioMCQ. Additionally, leveraging our dataset with different training strategies, we achieve 78.2\% on MMAU-test-mini, 75.6\% on MMAU, 67.0\% on MMAR, and 71.7\% on MMSU, establishing new state-of-the-art performance.

papers.title: Speech-CLAP: Towards Style-Aware Speech Representation
papers.abstract: Contrastive Language–Audio Pretraining (CLAP) has shown strong performance in modeling general audio--text, but remains limited in capturing complex and diverse speech styles. We propose Speech-CLAP, a contrastive model that learns joint representations of speech audio and style descriptions, capturing both intrinsic speaker characteristics (e.g., age, gender, timbre) and dynamic expressive features (e.g., emotion, speaking rate, intonation). The model is trained on a 10,000-hour speech–style corpus with detailed textual descriptions of speech styles, and we further introduce the Speech-Style Similarity Benchmark ($S^3$Bench), the first cross-lingual benchmark for speech-style similarity, which includes both Chinese and English speech-style pairs with human preference annotations. Experimental results show that Speech-CLAP aligns closely with human judgments. This work not only provides a solid foundation for style-aware speech representation but also establishes an important evaluation standard for future research on speech-style modeling. We will release both the Speech-CLAP model and the $S^3$Bench to the community to facilitate future research on speech-style modeling.

llm_ranked.motivation_cn: ASR系统常因声学变化产生转录错误，需后处理校正；现有LLM纠错方法使用固定N-best假设数，缺乏保障。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于风险控制的自适应框架，利用置信度分数和Learn then test动态确定最优假设数。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在控制预期词错误率降解的条件下，有效提升ASR纠错效率与可靠性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该方法为ASR后处理提供了可解释的自适应纠错策略，有助于增强识别准确性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: large-scale empirical study of denoising language models for ASR accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向ASR精度的去噪语言模型大规模实证研究
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向ASR精度的去噪语言模型大规模实证研究
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Conducts the first independent large-scale study of denoising language models for ASR, releasing a reproducible pipeline and analyzing key design choices.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对去噪语言模型在ASR中的应用，首次开展大规模独立实证研究。构建并发布完整可复现管线，系统评估数据增强、TTS系统和解码策略等设计因素的影响。该工作为去噪语言模型的优化提供了重要见解，并通过开源促进了后续研究。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 复现与剖析去噪语言模型在语音识别中的应用
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 去噪语言模型虽能提升ASR性能，但其训练管线复杂，设计选择影响不明。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建完整的可复现管道，系统研究数据增强、TTS系统和解码策略等关键设计轴。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 通过数十种配置实验，揭示了各因素对性能的影响，并开源了管线。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该研究为去噪语言模型在ASR中的优化提供了实证指导，促进了可复现研究。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: neural speech decoding using pretrained Whisper ASR model for high accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用预训练Whisper ASR模型实现高精度神经语音解码
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用预训练Whisper ASR模型实现高精度神经语音解码
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces Whisper-BCI, the first neural speech decoder that integrates MEA recordings with a large pretrained ASR model, achieving improved accuracy and generalization.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 提出Whisper-BCI，首次将高分辨率多电极阵列记录与大型预训练ASR模型Whisper集成，用于神经活动语音解码。利用Whisper编码器层学到的音素选择性表示，实现更准确、更泛化的解码性能。该方法为脑机接口语音恢复提供了新范式，有望改善瘫痪患者的沟通能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于Whisper解码神经活动的实时脑机接口语音
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有神经语音解码器依赖循环模型，数据需求大、泛化差，难以跨会话或个体迁移。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 首次将高精度MEA记录与预训练ASR模型Whisper集成，利用其音素选择性表示进行解码。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在脑机接口语音解码任务上取得高效且可泛化的性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作展示了预训练ASR模型在神经解码中的潜力，为失语患者提供了新的通信恢复途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: CoT fine-tuning for speech LLMs to improve reasoning and reduce latency in voice interactions
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过思链微调提升语音LLM推理能力并降低交互延迟
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过思链微调提升语音LLM推理能力并降低交互延迟
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Investigates chain-of-thought fine-tuning for speech LLMs, improving reasoning accuracy by 2.4x and proposing methods to reduce latency for voice-based agents.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音大语言模型的推理能力与响应延迟问题，研究思链微调的影响。通过在文本空间进行推理，语音LLM的准确率平均提升2.4倍；并提出“边听边想”方法，在聆听过程中启动推理以减少延迟。该工作为构建更智能、更实时的语音交互代理奠定了基础。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 语音大语言模型能在聆听时思考吗？
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音LLM在复杂推理任务上表现不佳，且响应延迟影响交互体验。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 对多流语音LLM进行思链微调，并提出在聆听过程中提前生成推理步骤以减少延迟。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 推理准确率平均提升2.4倍，并有效降低额外延迟。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该方法显著增强了语音LLM的推理能力和实时性，推动了口语对话系统发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multi-task model enhances TTS quality and unifies speech processing
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多任务模型提升TTS质量并统一语音处理
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多任务模型提升TTS质量并统一语音处理
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Presents SpeechOp, a multi-task latent diffusion model that adapts pre-trained TTS into a universal speech processor, improving TTS and speech-to-speech tasks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 提出SpeechOp，一种多任务潜扩散模型，将预训练TTS系统转化为通用语音处理器。通过继承TTS的丰富自然语音理解能力，该模型在多种语音任务上取得优异表现，同时增强了核心TTS质量。该方法为高效且高质量的语音处理提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpeechOp：生成式语音处理的推理时任务组合
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音处理任务（如增强）数据稀缺，导致生成模型失真；TTS系统强大但未能直接用于这些任务。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出多任务潜扩散模型，将预训练TTS转化为通用语音处理器，支持推理时组合多种任务。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在提升TTS质量的同时，改善了语音到语音任务（如增强）的性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该框架有效结合了TTS的丰富先验与多种语音处理能力，推动了统一语音生成模型的发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: true speech-to-speech model without text intermediates, enhancing voice interaction quality
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 无需文本中介的真正语音到语音模型，提升语音交互质量
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 无需文本中介的真正语音到语音模型，提升语音交互质量
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a true speech-to-speech LLM that directly processes speech without text, preserving paralinguistic cues and achieving SOTA in spoken QA.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 提出一种无需文本引导的真正语音到语音大语言模型，通过模态层分割和冻结预训练策略，直接理解并生成语音，保留副语言信息。实验表明，该模型在口语问答任务上达到领先水平，同时保持了预训练文本LLM的推理能力，为自然高表现力的语音交互提供了新方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 迈向无需文本引导的真正语音到语音模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 传统口语对话系统依赖文本中介，丢失副语言信息，限制表达力。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于模态层分割架构和冻结预训练策略的真正语音到语音大语言模型。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在口语问答等任务上达到最先进性能，并保留了文本LLM的推理能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该模型为高表现力语音交互开辟了新途径，消除了文本瓶颈。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: introduces a group-wise granularity-ordered codec for efficient speech generation with low token rate
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出分组粒度排序编解码器，实现低令牌率的高效语音生成
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出分组粒度排序编解码器，实现低令牌率的高效语音生成
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes Gogo, a granularity-ordered speech codec that quantizes frames into coarse-to-fine tokens, enabling efficient two-stage speech generation with extremely low token rate.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音语言模型需要既能捕捉高层语义又能保留声学细节的离散表示，本文提出 Gogo，一种按粒度排序的分组式语音编解码器，将每组帧量化为从粗到细的令牌。基于此，构建了 GogoSpeech 两阶段生成模型，先以极低令牌率构建粗粒度语音骨架，再补充细节。实验证明，该方法在保证感知质量的同时，显著提高了语音生成的稳定性和效率。该工作为高效语音生成提供了新的编解码设计思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Gogo：面向稳定高效语音生成的分组粒度排序编解码器
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 当前语音编解码器难以同时满足高层语义建模和声学细节保留的需求，且生成效率待提升。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计分组粒度排序编解码器，将每组帧量化为从粗到细的排列，粗令牌编码高层信息，细令牌恢复细节。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现了极低令牌率的语音生成，模型稳定且高效，保持了高感知质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Gogo 及其两阶段生成框架为语音语言模型提供了高效的离散化与生成方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed

llm_ranked.evidence_en: training-free orchestration of specialized models for interactive multimodal AI with text-to-speech efficiency
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 无需训练的专用模型编排，实现交互式多模态AI，提升文本转语音效率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 无需训练的专用模型编排，实现交互式多模态AI，提升文本转语音效率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes MLLM Orchestration, a training-free approach to integrate multimodal LLMs into interactive AI systems, leveraging LLM reasoning to coordinate specialized models for natural multimodal interactions.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多种多模态大语言模型无法直接集成为统一交互系统的问题，本文提出 MLLM Orchestration 框架，无需额外训练，利用大语言模型的推理能力编排专用模型，实现自然的多模态交互。该方法支持文本、语音等模态的输入输出，并特别优化了文本转语音的效率。实验表明，该框架在保持模块化和可解释性的同时，显著提升了构建交互式多模态 AI 系统的效率。这为语音对话系统设计提供了灵活高效的方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 免训练的多模态大语言模型编排
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 不同多模态大模型之间缺乏直接集成方法，训练成本高且效率低下。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用 LLM 的推理能力协调多个专用模型，通过显式工作流实现多模态交互。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 无需额外训练即可构建交互式多模态 AI 系统，TTS 效率得到提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: MLLM Orchestration 提供了一种高效、模块化的多模态对话系统构建范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: chunk-based self-supervised learning for streaming and offline speech pre-training
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于分块的自监督学习，用于流式和离线语音预训练
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于分块的自监督学习，用于流式和离线语音预训练
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes Chunk SSL, a unified self-supervised learning algorithm for speech pre-training that operates on chunks, enabling both streaming and offline applications with high-resolution quantization.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对传统自监督语音预训练假设完整语句、无法适应流式场景的问题，提出 Chunk SSL 方法。该方法以语音块为单位进行掩码预测训练，并引入高分辨率有限标量量化，使预训练模型能够处理部分语音输入。实验表明，Chunk SSL 在流式与非流式任务上均取得与全句模型相当的性能，为低延迟语音通信提供了有效的预训练方案。该工作统一了流式和离线语音模型的训练框架，推动了实时语音应用的发展。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于分块的高分辨率有限标量量化语音预训练
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有自监督语音预训练假设全句输入，限制了流式应用中的性能。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于分块的自监督学习算法，结合掩码预测损失和高分辨率量化，迫使模型恢复被掩码帧的索引。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现了流式和离线场景下的统一预训练，性能与全句模型相当。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Chunk SSL 为实时语音交互系统提供了高效的预训练范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: large-scale self-supervised speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: controllable text-to-speech framework using LLM to generate vocal feature plans for enhanced speech synthesis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用大语言模型生成声学特征计划的可控文本转语音框架，提升合成质量
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用大语言模型生成声学特征计划的可控文本转语音框架，提升合成质量
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes BatonVoice, a framework for controllable TTS where an LLM interprets instructions and generates explicit vocal feature plans, decoupling instruction understanding from speech generation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 目前基于大模型的语音合成未能充分利用其指令跟随能力，可控性有限。本文提出 BatonVoice 框架，借鉴操作主义思想，将指令理解与语音生成解耦：LLM 充当指挥，理解用户文本指令并生成包含显式声学特征的计划，再由语音生成器执行。实验表明，该框架显著提升了 TTS 的控制精度与合成质量，实现了更自然、更具表现力的可控语音合成。该研究为利用大语言模型的智能提升语音合成交互性开辟了新路径。
llm_ranked.title_zh: BatonVoice：基于操作主义框架利用大语言模型增强可控语音合成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有大模型语音合成未能充分挖掘 LLM 的指令跟随潜力，导致可控性差。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出解偶指令理解与语音生成的框架，LLM 生成声学特征计划以控制合成。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 提升了文本转语音的指令跟随精度和自然度，合成质量更高。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: BatonVoice 为可控 TTS 提供了新范式，充分发挥了 LLM 的语言智能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: large-scale speech dialogue dataset for fine-grained style control in spoken dialogue models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向口语对话模型细粒度风格控制的大规模语音对话数据集
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向口语对话模型细粒度风格控制的大规模语音对话数据集
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces UltraVoice, a 830-hour speech dialogue dataset with fine-grained style control across emotion, speed, volume, accent, language, and composite styles, enhancing spoken dialogue model capabilities.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 当前口语对话模型缺乏精细的语音风格控制能力，限制了人机交互的自然度。本文发布 UltraVoice 数据集，包含超过830小时的语音对话，覆盖情感、语速、音量、口音、语言和组合风格六种风格维度。在 SLAM-Omni 和 VocalNet 等模型上微调后，模型的细粒度风格控制能力显著增强。该数据集填补了语音对话风格控制数据的空白，为构建更具表现力的语音助手提供了关键资源。
llm_ranked.title_zh: UltraVoice：面向口语对话模型的细粒度风格控制语音对话扩展
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有口语对话模型忽略语音风格控制，无法满足人类交互的多样性需求。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建多维度风格标注的大规模语音对话数据集，并提供指令进行微调。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 微调后的模型在多项风格控制指标上大幅提升，交互更自然。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: UltraVoice 为口语对话系统的风格化交互奠定了数据基础。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Unified SSL framework for speech and audio representations
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 语音与音频统一自监督表示学习框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 语音与音频统一自监督表示学习框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SPEAR is the first SSL framework to learn unified speech and audio representations via masked prediction of discrete tokens from multi-codebook vector quantisation, overcoming domain-specific limitations.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有自监督学习多为语音或音频单一领域设计，SPEAR首次提出统一框架，通过多码本矢量量化和掩码预测细粒度离散token，从混合数据中学习域通用的语音与音频表示。实验表明其跨域能力显著提升，为通用声学表征学习提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SPEAR：学习语音与音频统一表示的自监督框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音与音频自监督学习长期领域割裂，缺乏统一表示模型。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于多码本矢量量化的离散token掩码预测统一预训练目标。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 首次成功从混合数据学习跨域统一表示，性能优于单域模型。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SPEAR为通用声学表征学习开辟了新方向，跨域能力显著提升。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: large-scale self-supervised speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Diverse Romanian speech dataset improves ASR generalization in low-resource and OOD settings
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多样化罗马尼亚语音数据集提升低资源ASR泛化性能
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多样化罗马尼亚语音数据集提升低资源ASR泛化性能
llm_ranked.tldr_en: RO-N3WS provides 126h of diverse Romanian speech across domains, showing that fine-tuning on real data enhances ASR generalization, especially in low-resource and out-of-distribution conditions.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: ASR在低资源语言和分布外场景中泛化难，RO-N3WS提供超126小时多样化罗马尼亚语数据，覆盖新闻、有声书、电影、儿童故事和播客。微调实验表明，即使是少量真实数据也能显著提升Whisper和Wav2Vec 2.0的泛化能力，为低资源ASR提供了有效基准。
llm_ranked.title_zh: RO-N3WS：利用多样化罗马尼亚语音基准提升低资源ASR泛化能力
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 低资源语言ASR面临泛化瓶颈，缺乏多样化训练数据。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建多领域罗马尼亚语音数据集，并在多样ASR模型上评估微调与零样本性能。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 少量微调即显著提升OOD泛化能力，合成数据增强亦有效。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: RO-N3WS推动了低资源ASR的泛化研究，为多域场景提供基准。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Paralinguistic-aware speech-to-speech interaction using RL for conversational AI
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用强化学习实现副语言感知的语音到语音交互，优化对话系统
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用强化学习实现副语言感知的语音到语音交互，优化对话系统
llm_ranked.tldr_en: ParaS2S proposes an RL framework to align spoken language models for paralinguistic-aware S2S interaction, optimizing both content and speaking style with a dedicated benchmark.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 语音对话系统缺乏对情感、语调等副语言线索的感知与适当回应。ParaS2S提出强化学习框架，直接在波形层面评估并优化回复内容和说话风格，并构建ParaS2SBench基准。实验表明模型在自然度和表现力上显著提升，推进了情感化语音交互发展。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ParaS2S：评估与对齐面向副语言感知语音到语音交互的语音语言模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有S2S模型难以处理副语言线索，缺乏高质量表达性数据。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计ParaS2SBench基准，用RL在波形层面联合优化内容和风格。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 模型回复的自然度和风格适配性显著优于基线条统。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为副语言感知的语音交互提供基准和对齐方法，提升对话体验。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Syllable-level UASR improves ASR accuracy without needing G2P converters
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 音节级无监督ASR提升低资源语言识别准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 音节级无监督ASR提升低资源语言识别准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper introduces a syllable-level unsupervised ASR framework using masked language modeling, avoiding G2P reliance and GAN instability, achieving up to 40% relative CER reduction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 无监督语音识别多基于音素，依赖G2P且训练不稳定。本文提出以音节为单元、基于掩码语言建模的UASR框架，规避G2P需求和GAN不稳定性，在多语言实验中相对字符错误率降低40%，为低资源语言ASR提供鲁棒新路径。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 迈向音节级无监督语音识别
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 无监督ASR依赖G2P和GAN，成本高且不稳定。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 基于音节掩码语言建模，采用离散标记的无监督预训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在低资源语言上CER大幅降低，摆脱G2P依赖。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 音节级建模提升了无监督ASR的泛化性和稳定性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: proposes CTC-driven teacher forcing for fast and robust pseudo-labelling in unified speech recognition, directly improving ASR accuracy and training efficiency.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出CTC驱动的教师强制方法，用于统一语音识别中快速鲁棒的伪标签生成，直接提升ASR准确率。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出CTC驱动的教师强制方法，用于统一语音识别中快速鲁棒的伪标签生成，直接提升ASR准确率。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes CTC-driven teacher forcing to speed up pseudo-labelling and improve robustness of unified speech recognition models, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy with lower training cost.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对统一语音识别中自回归伪标签训练昂贵且易受分布偏移影响的问题，提出CTC驱动的教师强制方法，用单次前向传播生成注意力目标，加速训练并增强鲁棒性。在多个基准测试上取得最优结果，显著降低训练开销，提升模型对长序列和噪声的泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 关注CTC：用于统一语音识别的快速鲁棒伪标签方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 自回归伪标签训练成本高，且CTC与注意力分支解耦监督易导致分布偏移下的错误累积。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CTC驱动的教师强制，将CTC贪婪解码的伪标签输入解码器，单次前向生成注意力目标以加速训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种分布偏移条件下取得领先准确率，且训练效率显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 快速鲁棒的伪标签机制有效提升统一语音识别的准确率和泛化性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: addresses language disparities in speech recognition by improving group DRO with CTC-specific smoothing, directly enhancing ASR accuracy across subgroups.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过改进CTC损失下的群组分布鲁棒优化，缓解语音识别中的语言差异，直接提升不同群组的识别准确率。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过改进CTC损失下的群组分布鲁棒优化，缓解语音识别中的语言差异，直接提升不同群组的识别准确率。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes CTC-DRO to reduce language disparities in speech recognition by smoothing group weight updates in group DRO, achieving more equitable and accurate ASR across diverse linguistic subgroups.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音识别中不同语言子群性能差异问题，提出CTC-DRO方法，通过平滑群组权重更新防止对持续高损失群组的过度强调，同时结合长度归一化等手段消除CTC损失的虚假差异。实验表明该方法在多语言环境下显著缩小了群组间识别准确率差距，提升了最差群组的性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CTC-DRO：降低语音识别中语言差异的鲁棒优化
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 群体分布鲁棒优化在语音中因CTC损失与输入长度及语言属性相关，导致群组损失不能真实反映性能差异。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CTC-DRO，平滑群组权重更新，并结合长度归一化和相关性加权消除虚假差异。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个语言群组上显著缩小识别准确率差距，提升最差群组性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CTC-DRO有效增强了语音识别模型的群体公平性和整体准确率。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: proposes dual language modeling for LLM-based TTS to improve quality and stability, addressing information loss and error accumulation.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出双语言建模方法用于基于大语言模型的文本到语音合成，提升合成质量和稳定性。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出双语言建模方法用于基于大语言模型的文本到语音合成，提升合成质量和稳定性。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a dual language modeling framework for TTS to mitigate information loss and error accumulation in AR models, achieving higher quality and more stable speech synthesis.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对现有基于大语言模型的自回归TTS系统中离散化导致信息损失和误差累积的问题，提出双语言建模框架，通过引入语义和声学双重建模提升合成质量和稳定性。实验表明该方法在自然度和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，为高保真语音合成提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 理解与言说：基于双语言建模的文本到语音合成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 单码本建模信息损失大，层次化声学token缺乏语义结构，自回归易误差累积，影响TTS质量。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出双语言建模，分别对语义和声学序列建模，并设计解耦训练策略以提高稳定性。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 合成语音自然度和鲁棒性显著提升，优于主流AR-TTS模型。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 双语言建模有效减轻了误差累积和信息损失，为高质量TTS提供了可行方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: enables pure-speech-token dialogue by aligning speech and text tokens, improving conversational AI with frozen text LLMs.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过对齐语音与文本token，实现纯语音token对话，提升基于冻结文本LLM的语音对话AI。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过对齐语音与文本token，实现纯语音token对话，提升基于冻结文本LLM的语音对话AI。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Explores optimal speech token frame rate for inheriting text LLM knowledge, enabling efficient pure-speech-token dialogue systems with frozen LLMs, achieving competitive naturalness and understanding.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音对话模型中语音与文本token长度对齐的非最优问题，探索最优语音序列长度以实现从文本LLM高效迁移知识。通过系统的帧率搜索和微调策略，在冻结LLM上实现纯语音token对话，在保持文本理解能力的同时显著提升语音交互自然度，为轻量级多模态对话AI提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 对齐至关重要：使冻结文本大语言模型支持纯语音token对话
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音与文本token序列长度简单平均对齐可能并非最优，影响从文本LLM迁移知识的效果。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 探索语音token帧率对知识继承的影响，发现最优帧率并设计微调策略适配冻结LLM。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在纯语音token对话任务上取得与微调LLM相当的自然度和理解力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 通过对齐优化，冻结的强文本LLM可有效支持纯语音对话，降低训练成本。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: enables real-time reasoning within speech generation for conversational AI, reducing latency in speech dialogue.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 在语音生成过程中实现实时推理，降低语音对话延迟，提升对话AI交互效率。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 在语音生成过程中实现实时推理，降低语音对话延迟，提升对话AI交互效率。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes Mini-Omni-Reasoner, a framework enabling token-level reasoning interleaved with speech generation, achieving thinking-in-speaking to reduce response latency in large speech models for natural interaction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对大语音模型中“先思考后说话”范式引入显著延迟的问题，提出Mini-Omni-Reasoner框架，实现了语音生成期间的token级交织推理，即“边说边想”。通过将推理和生成融合在同一个自回归流中，在保持推理能力的同时极大缩短响应时间，为实时语音交互对话AI开辟了新路径。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Mini-Omni-Reasoner：大语音模型中的token级边想边说
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音推理采用先完整思考再生成语音的方式，导致实时交互中响应延迟明显。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出token级交织推理，在自回归语音生成的同时插入推理token，实现边说边想。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个对话基准上，响应延迟大幅降低且推理性能不受损。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 边说边想框架突破了语音对话实时性瓶颈，对构建自然流畅的语音AI具有重要意义。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: joint acoustic-semantic TTS modeling overcomes LLM alignment gap
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 联合声学-语义建模克服LLM对齐差距提升TTS质量
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 联合声学-语义建模克服LLM对齐差距提升TTS质量
llm_ranked.tldr_en: UniTTS addresses misalignment between semantic and acoustic info in LLM-based TTS by distilling a multi-codebook codec and jointly modeling both aspects, yielding improved synthesis quality.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该工作针对基于大语言模型的语音合成中语义与声学信息难以对齐的问题，提出蒸馏多码本编解码器DistilCodec与联合建模框架UniTTS，在统一模型中融合多尺度声学与语义表示。实验表明该方法能有效缓解信息断层，生成更自然、高质量的语音。其贡献在于为端到端TTS提供了一种简洁的对齐方案，无需分立模块即可提升合成保真度。
llm_ranked.title_zh: UniTTS: 面向端到端语音合成的联合声学-语义建模
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 基于LLM的TTS中语义与声学信息无法充分对齐，限制了音频信息访问。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DistilCodec蒸馏多码本编解码器，并与UniTTS框架联合建模声学与语义。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现了更优的声学-语义对齐，提升了合成语音的自然度与质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 联合建模是提升LLM-based TTS性能的有效途径，简化了系统设计。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: professional ASR benchmark exposes context utilization gap
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 专业领域ASR基准揭示语音识别上下文利用差距
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 专业领域ASR基准揭示语音识别上下文利用差距
llm_ranked.tldr_en: ProfASR-Bench introduces a benchmark for ASR in high-stakes domains, measuring how well models use context to improve recognition of entities and domain terms.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该工作构建了面向金融、医学、法律和科技等高风险场景的语音识别评测集ProfASR-Bench，旨在探测模型利用上下文信息的能力。数据集提供领域提示与实体丰富的语音对，支持传统及实体感知指标。测评揭示了现有模型在专业术语和关键实体上的显著短板，为提升ASR精准度提供了诊断工具。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ProfASR-Bench: 面向高风险应用的专业对话ASR数据集，揭示上下文利用差距
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有ASR评测低估了专业场景下的术语、语体和关键实体精度挑战。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建了含领域提示与实体标注的专业对话语音评测集，并设计实体感知指标。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 发现主流模型在专业实体上错误率极高，且未充分利用上下文提升识别。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 需发展强上下文感知的ASR技术以应对高风险应用准确度要求。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: open-source alignment corpus and instruction data for reproducible speech model training
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 开源语音-文本对齐与指令数据集助力可复现的语音模型训练
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 开源语音-文本对齐与指令数据集助力可复现的语音模型训练
llm_ranked.tldr_en: LLaSO provides the first fully open framework for large-scale speech-language modeling, including a 12M alignment corpus, 13.5M instruction dataset, and standardized eval.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该成果针对大型语音-语言模型研究缺乏透明、可复现基线的瓶颈，构建了首个全开源端到端框架LLaSO。框架包含1200万规模的语音-文本对齐语料、1350万实例的多任务指令微调数据及规范化评测套件。评测表明该框架能支撑高质量LSLM训练，并促进公平比较，有望成为语音模型训练的基础设施。
llm_ranked.title_zh: LLaSO: 面向大型语音-语言模型的可复现基础
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 当前LSLM缺乏统一的开源基准与训练数据，阻碍公平对比与复现。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 发布开源框架，包含大规模对齐语料、多任务指令数据集及标准化评测。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 利用该框架训练出的模型在多项任务上表现出色，且保证了可复现性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 开源且标准化的训练数据与评测对于推动语音模型发展至关重要。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: closing text-speech gap directly improves LLM-based speech recognition accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 弥合文本-语音理解鸿沟直接提升LLM的语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 弥合文本-语音理解鸿沟直接提升LLM的语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: The paper identifies a text-speech understanding gap in LLMs and proposes data-efficient methods to narrow it, enhancing speech recognition performance without costly synthetic data.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该工作指出适配语音后的大语言模型存在文本-语音理解性能差距，比级联管线或文本基线显著低下。为此探索数据高效的方法来缩小该鸿沟，避免依赖昂贵的大规模合成或专有数据。实验证明所提技术能显著提升语音输入的理解准确率，且对计算资源友好，为通用LLM的语音扩展提供了更实用的降模方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 缩小大语言模型中文本与语音理解的差距
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音适配LLM的语言理解性能远低于同量文本LLM，形成性能鸿沟。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出数据高效的对齐方案，利用少量适配器或课程学习等弥合差距。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个理解评测上大幅提升语音LLM准确率，逼近文本基线。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 无需大规模合成数据即可有效提升语音LLM理解能力，推动多模态LLM实用化。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy

llm_ranked.evidence_en: time-varying emotion control enhances expressiveness and quality of TTS
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 时变情感控制增强语音合成的表现力与质量
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 时变情感控制增强语音合成的表现力与质量
llm_ranked.tldr_en: T-VecTTS adds fine-grained, time-varying emotion control to a pre-trained flow-matching TTS using a light-weight adapter, enabling richer expression without full retraining.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该工作着眼于语音合成中情感表达粒度过粗的问题，提出T-VecTTS，在冻结的流匹配TTS模型上附加可训练分支，实现时间维度上变化的情感控制。通过定位影响情感的特定流步区间，精准注入情感信号。实验证明该方法在无需重新训练的情况下赋予合成语音更细腻的情绪变化，显著提升听觉自然度与表现力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: T-VecTTS: 向基于流匹配的TTS添加时变情感控制
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有TTS情感控制多为语句级，缺乏对时间维度变化的精细刻画。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在预训练流匹配TTS上附加轻量分支，识别并干预关键流步区间传递情感。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 合成语音情感表达流畅自然，且控制保真度高，用户接受度显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 轻量级情感适配为高表现力语音合成提供了经济且有效的技术路线。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: high-fidelity voice editing and zero-shot TTS with cross-attentive Mamba
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于交叉注意力Mamba的高保真语音编辑与零样本TTS
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于交叉注意力Mamba的高保真语音编辑与零样本TTS
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MAVE introduces a cross-attentive Mamba architecture for text-conditioned voice editing and TTS, achieving SOTA in editing and strong zero-shot synthesis.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出基于Mamba与交叉注意力的自回归架构MAVE，兼顾语音编辑与零样本语音合成。模型通过高效音频序列建模和精确文本-声学对齐，在真实音频上实现了保真度业界领先的语音编辑，同时在零样本TTS中超越现有扩散和自回归模型。其统一框架为高自然度语音交互应用提供了端到端解决方案，并具备强泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 说、编辑、重复：用交叉注意力Mamba实现高保真语音编辑与零样本TTS
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音编辑与合成模型在保真度和零样本能力上仍有不足。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计交叉注意力Mamba架构，融合高效序列建模与文本-声学对齐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在语音编辑上达到最优自然度，零样本TTS指标也领先主流模型。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Mamba架构为语音生成任务提供了高效且高质的统一建模途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: discrete flow matching for ASR, parallel decoding, audio-conditioned probability path to improve accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于语音识别的离散流匹配，并行解码，音频条件概率路径提升准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于语音识别的离散流匹配，并行解码，音频条件概率路径提升准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Drax proposes a discrete flow matching framework for ASR that enables efficient parallel decoding and aligns training with inference via audio-conditioned paths, improving accuracy.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音识别中非自回归模型未充分探索的问题，Drax提出离散流匹配框架，通过音频条件概率路径模拟推理中的中间错误，实现高效并行解码。理论分析将泛化差距与训练-推理分布差异联系起来，实验证明该方法在流式条件下显著提升识别准确率，为ASR的并行高效训练与推理提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Drax：基于离散流匹配的语音识别
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 探索扩散/流式非自回归模型在ASR中的潜力，实现高效并行解码。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出音频条件概率路径，引导模型通过模拟推理错误轨迹，结合离散流匹配框架训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明方法有效提升识别准确率，降低推理步数。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 离散流匹配为ASR带来并行高效与高精度的结合，具有实际应用价值。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: inference framework for SLMs to generate chain-of-thought reasoning while listening, enabling real-time speech-to-speech interaction
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 让语音语言模型边听边推理的推理框架，实现实时语音交互
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 让语音语言模型边听边推理的推理框架，实现实时语音交互
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Shanks enables spoken language models to generate chain-of-thought reasoning while listening, reducing latency in speech-to-speech interaction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音交互中模型在听完后思考导致高延迟的问题，Shanks提出一种推理框架，允许语音语言模型在监听用户输入时生成未发声的思维链推理。通过流式输入固定时长语音块，模型提前进行推理，从而在交互轮次中实现低延迟响应。实验证明该方法能显著提升语音交互的实时性和流畅度，对语音对话AI设计有重要贡献。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Shanks：语音语言模型的边听边思考
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 解决语音交互中模型等待完整输入后才思考导致的延迟问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出Shanks推理框架，在流式输入过程中提前执行思维链推理。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 有效降低语音交互延迟，实现实时对话。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 仿生边听边思考使语音交互更自然高效。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: highly efficient TTS system, low-dimensional latent space, flow-matching, character-level input, eliminates G2P and external aligners
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 高效TTS系统，低维隐空间，流匹配，字符级输入，消除音素转换和外部对齐器
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 高效TTS系统，低维隐空间，流匹配，字符级输入，消除音素转换和外部对齐器
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SupertonicTTS is a streamlined TTS system that achieves high efficiency via low-dimensional latent space, flow-matching, and character-level input, eliminating the need for G2P and aligners.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 为解决语音合成系统高效性和简洁性问题，SupertonicTTS采用低维隐空间、流匹配和字符级文本输入，构建了一个轻量级TTS流水线。通过ConvNeXt模块和跨注意力机制实现文本-语音对齐，省去了G2P和外部对齐器，并在批次推理中采用上下文共享策略进一步加速。实验表明该系统在保证音质的同时显著提升了合成速度和推理效率，对实时语音合成具有推进意义。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SupertonicTTS：迈向高效精简的文本到语音系统
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 构建高效且精简的TTS系统，减少模块和计算开销。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 基于低维隐空间自编码器、流匹配文本到隐变量映射、ConvNeXt和字符级输入。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现轻量级架构，合成速度显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 高效TTS设计为实时语音合成提供了可行方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Mitigates acoustic-semantic gap in speech-to-speech LLMs to preserve reasoning for conversational AI
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 弥合语音到语音大模型的声学-语义鸿沟，保持对话AI推理能力
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 弥合语音到语音大模型的声学-语义鸿沟，保持对话AI推理能力
llm_ranked.tldr_en: EchoX addresses the acoustic-semantic gap in speech-to-speech LLMs by leveraging semantic representations and dynamic speech target generation, preserving reasoning capabilities with only 6k hours of data.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音到语音大模型中因声学-语义鸿沟导致的知识和推理能力退化问题，提出EchoX框架，利用语义表示动态生成语音训练目标，融合声学与语义学习，仅用约六千小时数据即可保持强推理能力，显著提升了口语对话AI的智能水平。
llm_ranked.title_zh: EchoX：通过回声训练弥合声学-语义鸿沟以改进语音到语音大语言模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音到语音大模型常因训练范式未能弥合声学-语义鸿沟而导致推理能力下降。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出EchoX，利用语义表示动态生成语音训练目标，融合声学与语义学习。
llm_ranked.result_cn: EchoX在约六千小时数据上训练，保持了强大的推理能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: EchoX为语音大模型提供了有效的声学-语义对齐训练方法，增强了对话AI的智能性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: agentic framework for speech dataset quality control to ensure data reliability
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 语音数据集质量控制的智能体框架保证数据可靠性
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 语音数据集质量控制的智能体框架保证数据可靠性
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SpeechQC-Agent uses LLM-driven multi-agent workflows for flexible, scalable speech dataset verification across modalities and languages.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有语音数据集质量验证依赖静态脚本和人工专家，难以扩展。本文提出SpeechQC-Agent，首个自然语言驱动的智能体框架，通过将用户查询分解为DAG工作流并由模块化子智能体执行，实现跨模态、跨语言的灵活验证。实验表明其具有良好的通用性和扩展性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpeechQC-Agent：一种面向语音数据集质量的自然语言驱动多智能体系统
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有数据集质量验证流程静态且依赖人工，无法灵活扩展至多领域和多语言。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SpeechQC-Agent框架，利用LLM将用户查询分解为DAG工作流，通过模块化子智能体执行灵活验证。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在基准测试上展示了跨模态、跨语言的通用验证能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该框架为语音数据集质量控制提供了可扩展的自动化方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: parallel speech-text voice conversation model enabling real-time conversational AI
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 并行语音-文本对话模型实现实时对话AI
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 并行语音-文本对话模型实现实时对话AI
llm_ranked.tldr_en: DrVoice is a parallel speech-text generation model for voice conversation that jointly models speech and text autoregressively with dual-resolution representations.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有端到端语音生成模型缺乏语音与文本的相互感知，导致对话不自然。本文提出DrVoice，通过双分辨率语音表征和联合自回归建模，实现语音和文本的并行生成。实验表明该方法提升了语音对话的自然度和实时性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DrVoice：基于双分辨率语音表征的并行语音-文本语音对话模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有端到端语音生成方法缺乏语音与文本生成的相互感知，影响对话自然度。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DrVoice，采用联合自回归建模并行生成语音和文本，利用双分辨率语音表征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现了语音和文本模态的相互感知，提升了语音对话的流畅性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 并行生成是构建自然语音对话系统的有效途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: data-centric exploration of speech-language pretraining data processing and curation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 以数据为中心的语音-语言预训练数据处理和策展探索
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 以数据为中心的语音-语言预训练数据处理和策展探索
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This work conducts data-centric ablations on speech-language pretraining, focusing on processing web-crawled data and building synthetic datasets.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 语音-语言模型预训练中数据处理与策展的影响尚不清晰。本文通过系统消融实验，研究网络爬取音频处理、合成数据集构建等核心数据问题。结果表明数据策展策略显著影响下游问答性能，为语音-语言预训练的数据管线设计提供了指导。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 以数据为中心的语音-语言预训练改进经验
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 缺乏对语音-语言预训练数据处理和策展的受控消融研究，影响SQA性能提升。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 通过系统数据消融实验，研究网络爬取数据处理、合成数据构建等关键数据问题。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 揭示了数据策展策略对语音-语言模型性能的重要影响。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 以数据为中心的优化是提升语音-语言预训练效果的关键。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: parameter-efficient fine-tuning for large speech models using SVD and orthogonal basis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 参数高效微调大型语音模型，利用SVD和正交基
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 参数高效微调大型语音模型，利用SVD和正交基
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SumRA improves parameter-efficient fine-tuning for large speech models by using singular value decomposition and summed orthogonal bases to expand representation capacity.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 参数高效微调旨在减少大型语音模型适配的可训练参数。现有LoRA方法固定A矩阵限制了表征能力。本文提出SumRA，利用SVD初始化并学习多个正交基的线性组合，扩展低秩矩阵的表征空间。实验证明在相当性能下可进一步减少参数，为语音模型的高效迁移提供新方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SumRA：基于奇异值分解和求和正交基的参数高效微调
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有低秩适应方法中固定A矩阵导致表征容量受限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SumRA，使用SVD初始化并学习多个正交基的线性组合，扩展低秩矩阵的表示空间。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 相比LoRA，在保持性能的同时进一步减少了可训练参数。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SumRA为大型语音模型的高效微调提供了更优方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: advanced training methodologies for large speech models

llm_ranked.evidence_en: efficient audio-visual speech separation using lip semantics, multimodal learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用唇语语义的高效视听语音分离，体现多模态学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用唇语语义的高效视听语音分离，体现多模态学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Dolphin is an efficient audio-visual speech separation method that uses discrete lip semantics and lightweight architecture to reduce computational cost.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有视听语音分离方法计算成本高，难以实际应用。本文提出Dolphin，利用双路径轻量视频编码器提取唇动离散语义标记，结合多尺度注意力分离目标语音。实验表明该方法在保证分离质量的同时大幅降低参数量和计算开销。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于离散唇语语义和多尺度全局局部注意力的高效视听语音分离
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有视听语音分离方法参数量大、计算成本高，不适用于预处理场景。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出Dolphin方法，使用DP-LipCoder将唇动转化为离散语义标记，并构建轻量级音频分离网络。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在保持分离质量的同时显著降低参数和计算量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 高效的多模态方法使视听语音分离更具实用价值。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision and speech multimodal learning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: reward model and dataset for speech naturalness to align TTS with human preference
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 语音自然度奖励模型和数据集，用于对齐语音合成与人类偏好
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 语音自然度奖励模型和数据集，用于对齐语音合成与人类偏好
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SpeechJudge provides a large-scale human preference dataset and a reward model for speech naturalness, enabling better alignment of TTS models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 语音合成模型与人类感知对齐受限于缺乏大规模自然度偏好数据。本文发布SpeechJudge-Data（9.9万对语音人类反馈）并训练奖励模型，能够准确评判合成语音的自然度。该工作为语音合成领域建立了人类感知对齐的基础设施，有望显著提升TTS模型质量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpeechJudge：迈向语音自然度的人类水平评判
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 缺乏大规模语音自然度人类偏好数据，阻碍语音合成模型与人类感知对齐。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建大规模人类反馈数据集SpeechJudge-Data，并训练奖励模型来评判语音自然度。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 奖励模型能有效预测人类偏好，提升TTS模型对齐质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 大规模自然度评判数据和模型是语音合成质量提升的关键。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: benchmark for evaluating reasoning in voice-interactive systems, revealing modality gaps
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于评估语音交互系统推理能力的基准，揭示模态差距
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于评估语音交互系统推理能力的基准，揭示模态差距
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces VERA, a benchmark for evaluating reasoning in voice-interactive systems under real-time constraints, highlighting large text-voice performance gaps.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 提出VERA基准，专门用于评估语音交互系统在实时对话约束下的推理能力。通过改编文本基准构建2931个语音原生试题，涵盖数学、网络等五个领域。评估12个现代语音系统后发现，文本与语音之间存在显著的模态性能差距，为语音AI的优化提供了明确方向。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 语音推理能力评估：诊断模态引起的性能差距
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音交互系统评估主要改编文本基准，未充分考虑语音特有挑战和实时交互约束。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建VERA基准，包含2931个源自文本基准的语音原生片段，涵盖五个推理领域。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在主流语音系统上发现显著的文本-语音模态差距，如数学竞赛准确率从74.8%大幅下降。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该基准为分析语音交互系统的推理可靠性提供了诊断工具，促进语音AI设计优化。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: comprehensive benchmark for end-to-end speech LLMs in real-world conversations
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向端到端语音LLM真实对话的综合基准
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向端到端语音LLM真实对话的综合基准
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Presents WildSpeech-Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate end-to-end speech LLMs in practical speech conversations, capturing real-world challenges.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 推出WildSpeech-Bench，首个系统评估端到端语音大语言模型在真实口语对话中表现的基准。通过收集实际聊天数据并引入说话人属性、口吃等多样性，该基准弥补了现有评估对语音特有挑战的忽视，为提升语音LLM用户体验提供了重要工具。
llm_ranked.title_zh: WildSpeech-Bench：评估端到端语音LLM的真实场景基准
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 缺乏针对端到端语音LLM的专门基准，现有评估忽视语音特有的韵律、同音异义词等挑战。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 创建首个综合基准，系统策划真实口语对话数据，引入说话人属性、口吃等多样性。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 为在真实语音对话场景中评估语音LLM提供了标准化工具。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该基准推动了对语音LLM用户体验的深入理解，有助于指导模型优化。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: proposes autoregressive-compatible constraints for speech codec tokenization to improve generative modeling
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出自回归兼容约束改进语音编解码器分词，提升生成建模
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出自回归兼容约束改进语音编解码器分词，提升生成建模
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a framework to align speech tokenization with autoregressive training by introducing autoregressive-compatible constraints into codec training, improving sequence modeling for speech language models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文指出，现有语音编解码器主要面向压缩设计，未考虑自回归语言模型的训练特性，导致序列建模性能次优。为此，提出将自回归兼容约束引入编解码器训练，鼓励生成反映时序一致性的标记序列。实验表明，该方法能生成更适配自回归训练的表示，显著提升语音语言模型的序列建模效果。该工作为语音生成模型提供了更优的离散化方案，推动了语音大模型的训练效率与效果。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 超越压缩的语音编解码器：迈向自回归生成建模
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音编解码器主要面向压缩设计，未考虑自回归语言模型训练特性，导致序列建模性能次优。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出将自回归兼容约束引入编解码器训练，鼓励生成反映时序一致性的标记序列。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 生成的标记序列更好地适配自回归训练，提升了语音语言模型的序列建模效果。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 通过自回归感知的离散化，显著改善了语音语言模型的训练与生成性能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: advanced training methodologies for large speech models

llm_ranked.evidence_en: universal syllable-level speech tokenization for efficient temporal compression in speech language models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通用音节级语音分词，实现语音语言模型的高效时间压缩
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通用音节级语音分词，实现语音语言模型的高效时间压缩
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Presents Sylber 2.0, a universal framework for syllable-level speech coding that achieves low token rate (5 Hz) while enabling high-fidelity reconstruction across languages and styles.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 受限于英语且声学细节不足，现有音节级语音分词模型难以扩展。本文提出 Sylber 2.0，一个多语言通用音节编码框架，通过训练多语言语音数据和引入音节级声学编码器与声码器，实现了极低令牌率（约5Hz）下的高保真重建。该表示大幅压缩了语音序列长度，提高了语音语言模型的训练和推理效率，并支持跨语言和表达风格。这项工作为语音大模型的规模化训练提供了高效的离散化表示。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Sylber 2.0：通用音节嵌入
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有音节级语音分词局限于英语，且声学细节保留不足，阻碍语音语言模型扩展。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 训练多语言语音数据，设计音节级声学编码器和声码器，实现跨语言通用编码。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 令牌率低至约5Hz，重建语音保真度高，并支持多种语言和风格。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Sylber 2.0 为语音大模型提供了高效、通用的离散化方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: large-scale self-supervised speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: evaluation framework for character alignment in speech dialogue systems using audio LLMs and reinforcement learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用音频大语言模型和强化学习的语音对话系统角色对齐评估框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用音频大语言模型和强化学习的语音对话系统角色对齐评估框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes RoleJudge, an evaluation framework using audio LLMs to assess character alignment in speech dialogue, and incorporates RL to optimize character embodiment in role-playing agents.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 多模态大模型推动了语音对话系统中角色扮演的发展，但评估语音与角色的一致性存在挑战。本文提出 RoleJudge 框架，利用音频大语言模型从多模态、多维度评估语音与角色的对齐程度。进一步引入强化学习，优化角色扮演智能体的角色体现能力。实验验证了评估框架的有效性，并显示出优化后智能体在角色一致性上的提升。该工作为语音对话系统的角色塑造提供了定量的评估手段和优化方向。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 超越语音的角色：通过强化学习在大型音频语言模型中实现角色扮演评估
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音角色扮演智能体评估困难，缺乏量化的角色对齐度指标。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建 RoleJudge 评估框架，使用音频大模型多维度评估语音-角色对齐，并结合强化学习优化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 评估框架可靠，强化学习优化后角色体现能力增强。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为语音对话角色扮演提供了系统化评估与改进方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Chunk-based parallel decoding accelerates speech synthesis inference and enables streaming voice cloning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于块的并行解码加速语音合成推理，支持流式声音克隆
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于块的并行解码加速语音合成推理，支持流式声音克隆
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MGM-Omni is an Omni LLM with a dual-track architecture that decouples reasoning from speech generation, using chunk-based parallel decoding to accelerate inference and support low-latency streaming zero-shot voice cloning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 传统语音合成级联系统实时性差，MGM-Omni采用脑嘴分离双轨架构，通过分块并行解码缩小文本与语音令牌速率差距，加速推理并实现流式零样本声音克隆，同时支持全模态理解与长时语音生成，为高效自然交互提供新方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MGM-Omni：面向个性化长时语音的规模化全模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 统一全模态模型面临推理延迟和实时生成瓶颈。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用双轨令牌架构和分块并行解码，解耦推理与生成。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现低延迟流式语音生成和高质量零样本声音克隆。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: MGM-Omni在效率和个性化方面显著提升，推动实时语音交互应用。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Non-autoregressive audio diffusion jointly trained with text generation improves efficiency for speech synthesis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 非自回归音频扩散联合训练提升语音合成效率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 非自回归音频扩散联合训练提升语音合成效率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes Text-to-Talk, a unified framework that combines AR text generation with NAR audio diffusion in one Transformer, exploiting any-order AR for efficiency in speech-to-speech systems.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有语音对话多模态模型仅采用自回归方法，忽视文本与音频的关系差异。本文提出Text-to-Talk框架，在单一Transformer中融合自回归文本生成与非自回归音频扩散，利用吸收离散扩散的任意顺序自回归特性，统一训练目标，在保持语音质量的同时提升生成速度，为高效语音交互建模提供新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 从文本到对话：音频语言模型需要非自回归联合训练
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多模态模型忽视文本与音频依赖性差异，仅用自回归效率低。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出整合AR文本生成和NAR音频扩散的统一Transformer训练框架。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现了文本和音频的统一训练，提升生成效率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 非自回归方法有效平衡语音合成质量与速度。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed

llm_ranked.evidence_en: uses audio-visual speech recognition for recursive semantic enhancement in speech separation, leveraging multimodal cues
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用视听语音识别进行递归语义增强，实现视听多模态语音分离，利用视觉和语音的多模态线索
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用视听语音识别进行递归语义增强，实现视听多模态语音分离，利用视觉和语音的多模态线索
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes CSFNet, a coarse-to-fine audio-visual speech separation network that uses an AVSR model for recursive semantic enhancement, significantly improving separation quality by better exploiting visual information.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对现有视听语音分离方法未充分利用视觉语义的问题，提出CSFNet采用从粗到细的递归语义增强范式。通过将粗分离音频反馈至视听语音识别模型提取深层语义，指导精细分离，在多个数据集上分离性能显著提升，为多模态语音处理提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 从粗到细：面向语音分离的递归视听语义增强
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法依赖静态视觉表示，未能充分挖掘视听语义信息以提升分离效果。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CSFNet，先粗分离得到音频，再送入视听语音识别模型提取语义特征进行精细分离。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在语音分离任务上取得性能提升，优于仅用静态视觉特征的方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 递归语义增强能更有效利用视觉信息，显著提高多模态语音分离质量。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision and speech multimodal learning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: accelerates text-to-audio generation with one-step sampling, directly improving inference speed for audio synthesis.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过一步采样加速文本到音频生成，直接提升音频合成的推理速度。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过一步采样加速文本到音频生成，直接提升音频合成的推理速度。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a one-step sampling framework for fast text-to-audio generation using energy-scoring and knowledge distillation, achieving high-quality audio with significantly reduced latency.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对自回归模型结合扩散头的文本到音频生成中迭代采样导致的高延迟问题，提出基于能量评分和表示蒸馏的一步采样框架。将高斯噪声直接映射为音频隐变量，消除多步扩散过程，在AudioCaps上实现质量相当的音频生成，同时推理速度大幅提升，为实时音频合成提供了高效方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于能量评分与辅助上下文表示蒸馏的一步采样快速文本到音频生成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 自回归+扩散的文本到音频模型迭代解码多步采样导致实际应用延迟过高。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出能量距离训练目标结合表示蒸馏，训练能量评分头实现一步映射生成音频。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在AudioCaps上生成质量接近多步模型，且推理时间显著缩短。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 一步采样框架在保持音质的同时极大降低延迟，适合需要快速响应的音频合成场景。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed

llm_ranked.evidence_en: introduces text-aligned speech tokenization as a preprocessing step for spoken language modeling, directly improving data preparation.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 引入文本对齐的语音分词作为语音语言模型的数据预处理步骤，直接优化数据管道。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 引入文本对齐的语音分词作为语音语言模型的数据预处理步骤，直接优化数据管道。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes TASTE, aligning speech tokens with text transcription during tokenization via attention aggregation, enabling effective joint text-speech modeling for spoken language models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音语言模型中语音token与文本对齐不足的问题，提出TASTE方法，在分词阶段通过注意力聚合机制将语音token与对应文本对齐。在保留语音重建能力的同时实现跨模态语义对齐，实验表明该方法显著提升了联合文语建模的性能，为语音对话模型的数据预处理提供了有效方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: TASTE：面向口语语言建模的文本对齐语音分词与嵌入
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音token与文本之间存在模态鸿沟，难以直接用于联合文语建模。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在语音分词阶段，通过注意力聚合对齐语音与文本，以语音重建为训练目标。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多项联合建模任务中表现优异，有效提升口语语言模型的跨模态理解能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 文本对齐的语音分词是提升语音大模型性能的关键预处理步骤。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: improves VQ-VAE based speech codec robustness to quantization artifacts, enhancing preprocessing tokenization quality for speech models.
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提升VQ-VAE语音编解码器对量化误差的鲁棒性，改善语音模型预处理分词质量。
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提升VQ-VAE语音编解码器对量化误差的鲁棒性，改善语音模型预处理分词质量。
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes self-guided training for VQ-VAE decoders to mitigate quantization errors, achieving high-fidelity neural speech codec without extra complexity, crucial for efficient speech tokenization in large speech models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对VQ-VAE神经语音编解码器因量化误差导致重建保真度受限的问题，提出自引导训练机制，通过让解码器从连续嵌入中学习来增强对量化伪影的鲁棒性。在不增加码本大小或层次的前提下显著提高重建质量，为语音大语言模型提供更高保真的离散token，平衡压缩率和建模难度。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 自引导：训练VQ-VAE解码器对量化伪影鲁棒以实现高保真神经语音编解码
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VQ-VAE编解码器的量化误差限制重建保真度，增大码本又会增加下游建模负担。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用解码器对连续嵌入的优质输出作为自引导信号，训练解码器抵抗量化噪声。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在相同复杂度下显著提升重建音质，优于传统VQ-VAE和层次化方案。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 自引导训练为高保真、低复杂度语音编解码器提供了有效方法，利于语音大模型发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: latent speech patches improve efficiency and alignment in speech-text pre-training
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 隐式语音块提升语音-文本预训练的效率与对齐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 隐式语音块提升语音-文本预训练的效率与对齐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: LST aggregates speech tokens into latent patches, balancing sequence length between modalities for more compute-efficient and aligned speech-text model training.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该工作针对语音令牌序列过长导致计算效率低、跨模态对齐困难的问题，提出隐式语音-文本Transformer（LST），将离散语音令牌聚合成高阶隐式语音块作为自回归单元。这一设计使语音与文本的序列粒度匹配，显著降低训练和推理开销，并在预训练中促进更好的跨模态对齐。实验表明LST在多项语音理解与生成任务上达到更高性能且资源消耗更低，为大规模语音模型训练提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 隐式语音-文本Transformer
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音令牌序列远长于文本，导致计算失衡并阻碍跨模态对齐。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将语音令牌聚合为隐式语音块，统一序列粒度后进行自回归建模。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 训练效率提升数倍，同时在下游任务上取得了更高的语音理解与生成性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 语音块化是一种有效的预训练加速与对齐增强策略，有助于语音模型规模化。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: advanced training methodologies for large speech models

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multimodal LLM integrating speech and text, Modality-Aware Mixture of Experts for cross-modal understanding
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 集成语音和文本的多模态大语言模型，模态感知专家混合架构促进跨模态理解
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 集成语音和文本的多模态大语言模型，模态感知专家混合架构促进跨模态理解
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MoST presents a speech-text multimodal LLM with Modality-Aware Mixture of Experts, enhancing modality-specific and cross-modal learning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多模态模型用相同参数处理不同模态忽视差异的问题，MoST提出模态感知专家混合架构，通过模态特定专家组捕获领域模式、共享专家促进信息传递，实现语音和文本的无缝融合。该模型在多项语音-文本理解任务上取得提升，展示了语音大模型与多模态学习的有效结合，为语音交互和跨模态理解提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MoST：基于模态感知专家混合的语音与文本融合
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有模型未考虑语音和文本模态的内在差异，用相同参数处理。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计模态感知专家路由，包括模态特定专家组和共享专家，实现分模态处理。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在跨模态任务上性能优于统一参数模型。

llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建全面基准，评估音频编解码器作为分词器和解分器时的语义与声学性能。

llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: AudioCodecBench 为音频离散化方案的选择提供了标准化评测工具。

llm_ranked.result_cn: 在去混响和降噪上，客观与主观指标均优于现有通用增强方法。

llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出音频贡献感知的后训练方法，量化音频对正确性的影响以优化训练阶段数据分配。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 通过实验表明该方法能够提升模型在音频任务上的表现。

llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有语音识别对抗攻击研究只关注准确率下降，忽视了效率。本文提出多目标重复加倍激励攻击MORE，同时降低识别准确率和推理效率。实验揭示了大型ASR模型在多维攻击下的脆弱性，为鲁棒语音识别系统设计提供参考。

llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出MORE攻击，同时攻击识别准确率和效率，进行全面鲁棒性研究。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 揭示了ASR模型在多目标攻击下的脆弱性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 需要从多维度审视ASR模型的鲁棒性。

llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a semi-supervised speech enhancement method using mean-teacher and domain adversarial learning with gradient-guided channel attenuation to better exploit unlabeled noisy data.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文针对有监督语音增强在真实噪声数据上泛化差的问题，提出 SS-SENet 半监督方法，结合均值教师和域对抗学习，并设计梯度引导通道衰减模块以抑制域特定特征。实验显示，利用无标签数据可显著提升模型在实际场景中的语音增强效果。该方法可作为语音识别等下游任务的预处理模块，提高系统对噪声的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于梯度引导通道衰减的半监督语音增强
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 有监督语音增强模型在真实噪声条件下泛化能力有限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用均值教师框架与域对抗学习，并设计 GGCA 模块增强域不变特征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在真实噪声数据上取得了增强效果的提升，泛化性能优于有监督方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 半监督方法和 GGCA 模块有效提升了语音增强的域泛化能力。
